brionna jones.comment: Jones underwent right knee surgery Monday and is without a timetable to return, Sara Jane Gamelli of BallisLife.com reports.

azura stevens.comment: General manager Jeff Pagliocca said Thursday that Stevens (knee) has resumed full basketball activities and is "hopefully a few weeks away" from returning to game action, Jack Maloney of CBS Sports reports.

courtney vandersloot.comment: Chicago general manager Jeff Pagliocca said Thursday that Vandersloot (knee) is back on the court and working out at full speed, Jack Maloney of CBS Sports reports.

nell angloma.comment: Angloma (overseas commitment) has been ruled out for Sunday's preseason game against the Liberty.

aaliyah edwards.comment: Edwards (thigh) won't play in Sunday's preseason game against the Liberty.

leila lacan.comment: Lacan (overseas commitment) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against New York.

shey peddy.comment: Peddy (lower leg) has been ruled out for Sunday's preseason game against the Liberty.

awak kuier.comment: Kuier (overseas) won't play in Sunday's preseason game against the Aces.

alanna smith.comment: Smith (quadriceps) is questionable for Sunday's preseason game against the Aces.

arike ogunbowale.comment: Ogunbowale (ankle) is listed as out for Sunday's preseason game against Las Vegas.

kate martin.comment: The Valkyries announced Tuesday that Martin has been diagnosed with a Grade 2 right quad strain and will be re-evaluated in a week, Sara Jane Gamelli of BallisLife.com reports.

cecilia zandalasini.comment: Zandalasini is not with the team and did not play in Saturday's 78-76 preseason win over the Storm.

juste jocyte.comment: Jocyte is not with the team and did not play in Saturday's 78-76 preseason win over the Storm.

kaila charles.comment: Charles is not with the team and did not play in Saturday's 78-76 preseason win over the Storm.

monique billings.comment: Billings won't return to Saturday's exhibition game against Nigeria due to a right ankle injury, Scott Agness of FieldhouseFiles.com reports. She'll finish with seven points (3-3 FG, 1-1 3Pt), two rebounds and one steal in six minutes.

janiah barker.comment: Barker is in concussion protocol after taking a blow to the head during Sunday's preseason game against the Japan National Team, Nekias Duncan of Yahoo Sports reports.

dorka juhasz.comment: Juhasz (overseas commitment) is out for Friday's preseason game against the Tempo.

napheesa collier.comment: Collier underwent surgery on her left ankle March 24 and is expected to return to on-court activities in early June, Sara Jane Gamelli of BallisLife.com reports.

ugonne onyiah.comment: Onyiah (overseas commitment) has been ruled out for Sunday's preseason game against the Sun, Madeline Kenney of the New York Post reports.

raquel carrera.comment: Carrera (overseas commitment) has been ruled out for Sunday's preseason game against the Sun, Madeline Kenney of the New York Post reports.

betnijah laney-hamilton.comment: Laney-Hamilton is listed as questionable for Sunday's preseason game against the Sun due to reconditioning, Madeline Kenney of the New York Post reports.

marine fauthoux.comment: Fauthoux (knee) will be joining the Liberty for the 2026 season, Myles Ehrlich of Winsidr.com reports.

kathryn westbeld.comment: Westbeld has been diagnosed with a torn ACL and will miss the 2026 WNBA season, Dylan Kane of The IX Sports reports.

kamiah smalls.comment: Smalls (knee) is listed as out for Sunday's preseason game against Los Angeles.

teja oblak.comment: Oblak (quadriceps) has been ruled out for Sunday's preseason game against the Sparks.

karlie samuelson.comment: Samuelson has been ruled out for Sunday's preseason game against the Sparks due to a left foot issue.

sarah ashlee barker.comment: Barker (illness) is questionable for Sunday's preseason game against the Sparks, Sean Highkin of RoseGardenReport.com reports.

emily engstler.comment: Engstler (ankle) is questionable for Sunday's game against Los Angeles, Sean Highkin of RoseGardenReport.com reports.

megan gustafson.comment: Gustafson (thigh) is questionable for Sunday's preseason game against the Sparks, Sean Highkin of RoseGardenReport.com reports.

nika muhl.comment: Muhl (knee) was selected by the Fire in the second round of the WNBA Expansion Draft on Friday, Annie Costabile of Front Office Sports reports.

jordan horston.comment: Horston (knee) has been ruled out for Wednesday's preseason game against the Fire, Jeff Brown of Storm Chasers reports.

katie lou samuelson.comment: Samuelson (knee) has no timetable for a return to action, Roberta Rodrigues of Beta Basket reports.

ezi magbegor.comment: The Storm announced Monday that Magbegor is expected to miss at least 6-8 weeks due to a right foot injury, Alexa Philippou of ESPN.com reports.

nikolina milic.comment: Milic (reconditioning) didn't play in Friday's 73-66 preseason loss to the Lynx.

maria conde.comment: Conde (overseas commitment) has been ruled out for Friday's preseason game against the Lynx, Chelsea Leite of The IX Sports reports.

saffron shiels.comment: Shiels is not expected to play with the Tempo in 2026, Khristina Williams of MSG Network reports.

charlise dunn.comment: Dunn signed a two-year deal with Australia's Sydney Flames on Thursday and won't play for the Tempo during the 2026 season, Zulfi Sheikh of Sportsnet reports.

nyla harris.comment: Harris (leg) has been ruled out for Sunday's preseason game against Atlanta, Jenn Hatfield of The Next reports.

michaela onyenwere.comment: Onyenwere (leg) has been ruled out for Sunday's preseason game against the Dream, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports.

shakira austin.comment: Austin (reconditioning) has been ruled out for Sunday's preseason game against Atlanta, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports.
